justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's date and time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, but could have offered more options when the initial requests were unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made one slightly redundant API call by checking for availability on June 10th and 12th separately when they could have been combined.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was mostly fine, with the agent maintaining a professional tone and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well, maintaining context and expanding the search intelligently, though it could have offered more options in a single turn.
